suggested_rules: Program is relation context, not merge authority for projects. Only project_name + corridor/scope define identity.
rationale: All candidate edges are based solely on shared program (MTA Metro-North Railroad), which is explicitly not merge authority per the canon (program is relation context). Each record has a distinct project_name (strong identity field), and no other identity fields are shared. Test 1 (contradiction) applies: different project_names force do_not_merge. No lifecycle records within the cluster share a base identity. All records are distinct projects from the same document listing.
